needs_manual.description: Elk harvest statistics page - no 2023 or 2024 elk hunt statistics PDF found (only 2022 and earlier). CDFW may not have published these yet or they may be combined with tooth age data.

notes: All files sourced from official CDFW website (wildlife.ca.gov) and their NRM document system (nrm.dfg.ca.gov).
Draw statistics are split by weapon type and preference point ranges. California uses a preference point system for deer and elk.
Deer draw categories: Apprentice, Area Specific Archery, General Late Season, Muzzleloader, Zone Hunts.
Elk draw categories: Apprentice, Antlerless/Either-sex, Bull/Spike Bull.
The Big Game Digest contains regulations, season dates, zone maps, and tag quotas.
Elk harvest data lags behind deer harvest data; the most recent standalone elk hunt statistics file found was for 2022.
California deer harvest reporting is mandatory by January 31 each year. Elk harvest is also mandatory.
